title: Hanna Lightweight Skirt 工艺翻译参考

sections.title: Quality / 面料与核心卖点
sections.summary: 提炼面料性能要求和核心卖点，适合业务与样衣团队对齐理解。

segments.source: VALUE DRIVER: "Drop-in" side pockets
segments.translation: 核心卖点：侧插袋设计

segments.source: Wrinkle free fabric
segments.translation: 抗皱面料

segments.source: Glued bottom hem
segments.translation: 贴合下摆工艺

segments.source: Quality spec: Lightweight fabric, quick dry and moisture wicking. 4-way stretch and wrinkle free. Should be able to have glued edges. Plain jersey / no structure with a good "body" not flimsy, but more spongy. More or less the fabric below, please advice if you believe it is a good fit.
segments.translation: 面料要求：轻薄面料，具备快干排湿功能；四面弹力且抗皱；需支持无缝胶合工艺；采用平纹针织结构，面料需有骨感、不软塌，并带有偏海绵感的柔软手感。请根据下方参考面料评估是否合适。

sections.title: Construction / 款式结构
sections.summary: 概览整件半裙的主要结构要求。

segments.source: Lightweight skirt with double pockets at side
segments.translation: 轻薄半裙，侧边双口袋设计

segments.source: Pocket at CB in waist seam
segments.translation: 后中腰缝位置增加口袋

segments.source: Filled piping detail at front and back
segments.translation: 前后片增加夹牙滚边细节

segments.source: Glued hem at bottom
segments.translation: 下摆采用贴合工艺

segments.source: Folded waist with elastic at waist
segments.translation: 折叠式松紧腰头

segments.source: Inner shorts attached to skirt
segments.translation: 裙身内置短裤衬里

segments.source: Rubber logo front and back
segments.translation: 前后位置均有硅胶 Logo

sections.title: Details OP1 / 细节方案一
sections.summary: 细节定位、口袋结构和下摆标注。

segments.source: Rubber logo glued to fabric, 53x13 mm wide, upraised print. Centered, 2 cm from waist. Artwork sent separately.
segments.translation: 硅胶 Logo，尺寸 53x13mm，立体压印效果；居中放置，距腰线 2cm；图稿另发。

segments.source: Open pocket at CB, 12 cm wide, see sep image for reference
segments.translation: 后中开口袋，宽 12cm，具体结构参照单独图片。

segments.source: Filled piping in contrast colour
segments.translation: 撞色夹牙滚边。

segments.source: Double layer shell pocket, folded and glued top
segments.translation: 双层面料口袋，口袋顶端折叠并做贴合处理。

segments.source: New inner shorts, see next page for details
segments.translation: 新增内置短裤，详见下一页。

segments.source: Rubber logo glued to fabric, 18x15 mm wide, upraised print. 3 cm from hem, 1.5 cm from piping.
segments.translation: 另一处硅胶 Logo，尺寸 18x15mm，距下摆 3cm，距夹牙滚边 1.5cm。

segments.source: Glued hem, slight shaped front and back
segments.translation: 贴合下摆，前后幅做轻微造型。

sections.title: Inner Shorts / 内置短裤
sections.summary: 重点关注短裤的隐形效果、防滑功能和口袋设计。

segments.source: Logo rubber print inside leg as grip function to prevent shorts from moving upwards
segments.translation: 裤腿内侧增加硅胶 Logo 防滑带，用于防止短裤上移。

segments.source: Slanting side pocket, glued hem for flat appearance
segments.translation: 侧边斜插袋，口袋边缘采用贴合工艺，保证外观平整。

segments.source: New inner shorts for least visible appearance
segments.translation: 新版内置短裤，目标是尽量降低外观显露感。

segments.source: No CF seam
segments.translation: 去除前中缝。

segments.source: Glued hems or similar flat and clean making
segments.translation: 裤腿边缘采用无缝贴合或类似的平整工艺。

segments.source: Slanting pocket at right-hand side
segments.translation: 右侧设斜插袋。

sections.title: Details OP2 / 细节方案二
sections.summary: 方案二在方案一基础上增加开衩与不同滚边处理。

segments.source: Please send 2 samples, one with slit (opt 2) and one with piping (opt 1)
segments.translation: 请提供两件样品：一件做开衩（方案二），一件做夹牙滚边（方案一）。

segments.source: Rubber logo glued to fabric, 53x13 mm wide, upraised print. Centered, 2 cm from waist.
segments.translation: 后腰下方居中位置放置 53x13mm 硅胶 Logo，距腰顶 2cm。

segments.source: Seam stitched and turned
segments.translation: 缝线结构改为车缝后翻处理。

segments.source: Double layer shell pocket, folded and glued top
segments.translation: 双层面料口袋，口袋顶端做贴合工艺。

segments.source: Slit at seam, 8 cm high
segments.translation: 侧缝位置开衩，高度 8cm。

segments.source: Glued hem, slight shaped front and back
segments.translation: 下摆贴合处理，前后幅略微塑形。

sections.title: References & Colours / 参考图与配色
sections.summary: 用于打样时快速回查结构参考和颜色定义。

segments.source: Reference: open pocket CB
segments.translation: 参考图：后中腰顶口袋。

segments.source: Reference: Rubber logo print inside leg
segments.translation: 参考图：裤腿内侧 Logo 防滑带。

segments.source: Body: Navy
segments.translation: 大身面料：藏青色。

segments.source: Inner shorts: DTM
segments.translation: 内置短裤：顺大身面料色。

segments.source: Thread: DTM
segments.translation: 缝纫线：顺大身面料色。

segments.source: Piping: White
segments.translation: 滚边：白色。

segments.source: Bird: White
segments.translation: 飞鸟图案：白色。

segments.source: Macade logo: White
segments.translation: Macade 品牌标识：白色。
